# External-oracle reference for kshana's lunar CCSDS OEM export.
# Oracle: oem 0.4.5 (Brad Sease <bradsease@gmail.com>, MIT) + astropy + numpy.
# Independent CCSDS 502.0-B OEM parser; separate codebase from src/oem.rs.
# Consumed by tests/lunar_interoperability_export_reference.rs.
# See generate_lunar_interoperability_export_reference.py for provenance/scope.
#
# TOKENS <combo> | REF_FRAME | TIME_SYSTEM | CENTER_NAME | OBJECT_NAME | OBJECT_ID
# STATE  <combo> | <index> | px,py,pz [km] | vx,vy,vz [km/s]  (as the oracle decoded them)
# NEGCTRL <combo> | <REJECTED|ACCEPTED> | <reason>
